description.value:
Controlling your body as you fly through the air has become second nature. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Leap] greater distances horizontally by spending additional actions. If you do, increase the limit on how far you can Leap by 5 feet for each additional action spent. Additionally, you can [[/act long-jump]] in a different direction than the direction you were Striding.

Special When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Fly] using a jet pack or jump jets while your feet are on the ground, you can spring upward to increase your fly Speed by 10 feet for the duration of the move action.
